zh.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank是Luedeke von Negendank和Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank的女兒，出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林阿赤 可利維次拉德波爾。她於1395年之前與Sir Thomas John Bigge在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank是Luedeke von Negendank和Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank的女儿，出生在格洛斯黑爾左圖姆 梅可倫波-史維林阿赤 可利維次拉德波爾。她于1395年之前与Sir Thomas John Bigge在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gese
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Eugene  , now used as a boy's given name in its own right, especially in North America. It has been made familiar by film actors such as  Gene Autry ,  Gene Hackman ,  Gene Kelly , and  Gene Wilder . It is also occasionally used as a girl's name, in which case it represents a respelling of   Jean .

variants.name: Eugene
meanings: From the Old French form of the Greek name Eugenios (from eugenēs ‘well-born, noble’). This name was borne by various early saints, notably a 5th-century bishop of Carthage, a 7th-century bishop of Toledo, and four popes. It is sometimes used as an Anglicized form of Irish Eóghan and has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Irish name Aodh.

en.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank was born in Radepohl, Crivitz, Mecklenburg-Schwerin as the daughter of Luedeke von Negendank and Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank. She married Sir Thomas John Bigge before 1395, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank est née à Radepohl, Amt Crivitz, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, fille de Luedeke von Negendank et Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas John Bigge avant 1395, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank wurde in Radepohl, Amt Crivitz, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin, als Tochter von Luedeke von Negendank und Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank geboren. Sie hat vor 1395 in England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas John Bigge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank è nata il nel Radepohl, Amt Crivitz, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin come figlia di Luedeke von Negendank e Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank. Lei sposato Sir Thomas John Bigge prima del 1395, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendankはグロssハーゾグトゥム メックレンブルグ-スチウエリンアムト クリヴィッツラデプオhルでLuedeke von NegendankとMrs. Adelheid Von Negendankの娘として生まれた。1395年以前にイギリスイギリスでSir Thomas John Biggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank(은)는 그로ss헤어즈그투 클렌버그-슈워인 아트 크리비츠 라데프h에서 Luedeke von Negendank(와)과 Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1395년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Thomas John Bigge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank nasceu em Radepohl, Amt Crivitz, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin filha de Luedeke von Negendank e Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas John Bigge antes 1395, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank родилась в местности радепохл, амт кривиц, гроssхирзогтум меккленбург-щвирин. Её родителей звали Luedeke von Negendank и Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas John Bigge перед 1395 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Gese von Negendank nació en Radepohl, Amt Crivitz, Großherzogtum Mecklenburg-Schwerin como hija de Luedeke von Negendank y Mrs. Adelheid Von Negendank. Se casó con Sir Thomas John Bigge antes de 1395, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
